commits: d38ab21: feat(schedule): add mtime caching and batch upsert for schedule sync performance
message: TDD implementation complete. All 48 tests pass. Migration #21 adds composite index on scheduled_executions(worktree_id, enabled). batchUpsertSchedules() replaces per-entry upsertSchedule() with single SELECT + transaction. CMATE.md mtime caching added to skip unchanged files. Zero ESLint/TypeScript errors.
